changes: Chat now avoids reusing stale sign-in tokens and known-bad BYOK keys when starting the AI runtime

Added a "Save Diagnostics…" option to Report Issue that saves a redacted diagnostics report locally (works offline, nothing is uploaded), and the app log file is now created owner-only so it is no longer readable by other users on the machine
Improved realtime voice recovery diagnostics when managed Gemini or OpenAI token minting fails
Improved desktop recording recovery so failed cloud reconciliation can retry from saved local transcript segments with clearer diagnostics
Reordering tasks now stays correct in large lists (100+ items in a section no longer scramble order), and rapid re-drags no longer leave a row stuck dimmed
